title: linaria stevenii
intro: Linaria stevenii, also known as the Toadflax or butterscotch ragwort, is a flowering plant in the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Linaria stevenii include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, as well as its use in treating skin conditions and wounds. Herbal preparations of Linaria stevenii include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
